prompt: Create a transparent-background 2D battle VFX asset for Pokemon-style dragon attacks. Show only the effect element, with no character, arena, text, UI, watermark, or frame. Use a compact draconic burst with a cobalt-violet core, ember-gold rim light, angular scale shards, and tight impact fragments. Make the subject a short directional slash made of fractured scales and a hot core, not a long travel beam. Keep the motion clear, compact, and battle-ready. Output a single isolated effect element on transparency.
negative_prompt: no background, no arena, no Pokemon body, no trainer, no text, no watermark, no UI, no frame, no checkerboard, no fake transparency pattern, no giant beam, no long travel trail, no fog wall, no elemental fireball
notes: Short directional support slash; not a travel segment.
